body:
## Problem

When an admin invites a user via `inviteUserByEmail`, Supabase sends an invite email with a confirmation link. However, there is no auth callback route or set-password page to handle the invite token. In production, clicking the invite link would land on the site with a token in the URL but nowhere to complete the signup.

## What's needed

1. **Auth callback route** (`/api/auth/callback`) — exchanges the invite/recovery token from the URL into a session via `supabase.auth.exchangeCodeForSession()`
2. **Set password page** (`/set-password` or similar) — allows the invited user to create their password via `supabase.auth.updateUser({ password })`
3. Handle the `type=invite` and `type=recovery` flows (password reset uses the same mechanism)

## Context

Discovered while testing #174 (invite status badges). The invite flow creates the user and the status badge works, but the invited user currently has no way to complete their account setup.

The `sendPasswordReset` server action in `src/actions/users.ts` also depends on this callback route to function correctly.
title: Add auth callback route and set-password page for invited users
